annotation: SUPERSEDED — M5 RRTMG artifacts are NOT the current RRTMG verdict
purpose: Provenance fix B5 (audit overclaim #12). The M5 RRTMG tier-1/tier-2 artifacts in this directory are HISTORICAL development artifacts from the M5 sprint and DO NOT represent the v0.6.0 RRTMG verdict. In particular, artifacts/m5/tier1_rrtmg_sw_parity.json reads pass=false; that is a stale M5-era SW result, NOT the current state. History is retained (not deleted); this file makes clear they are superseded.

current_rrtmg_verdict.fixture_source: wrf-derived RRTMG_SWRAD/RRTMG_LWRAD Fortran harness (real WRF objects, big-endian RRTMG_*_DATA)
current_rrtmg_verdict.known_pending: proofs/b3/tier2_rrtmg_oracle_parity.json is status=PENDING-ORACLE and is NOT claimed as proof; do not cite it as parity-proven.
